title: Inebriated Fellows Recommended
description: The recommended modpack for my discord's minecraft server: "Inebriated Fellows"
body:
### Recommended modpack for my discord server: "_Inebriated Fellows_"
_This is for PC's that are of at least normal capacity._

Enhances the vanilla experience of the game and adds a few features to the game that encourage the wonder of exploration.

Contains:
- Client-Based QoL (Appleskins, Borderless Mining, Lithium/Sodium/Indium, etc.)
- Adventure Improvements (Distant Horizons, Ender Dragon Fight Remastered, etc.)
- Chat improvements (Emojiful, Chat Heads, etc.)
- Content Packs (Deeper and Darker, Better Nether/End, etc.)
